title: AI Knowledge Production
public_claim: AI Knowledge Production is presented as an AI assurance and retrieval-integrity instrument.
distinctive_mechanism: The working mechanism is to move from threat model to test condition, system behavior, error mode, human-review checkpoint, scoring rule, and release or rejection gate. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.
use_value: It shows the utility of AI Knowledge Production by tying the project purpose to the mechanism that makes it inspectable, reusable, or professionally valuable.

minimum_public_demo: Open or inspect the local runtime path for AI Knowledge Production Runtime Or Interface Surface; confirm a room, action, or state record traces to the governing contract.
claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
